title: Use surgical cut-up techniques for non-complex tissue specimens
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use surgical cut-up techniques for non-complex tissue specimens demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare equipment for specimen cut-up

pcs.text: Set up and confirm integrity of instruments and consumables for safe, contaminant-free and efficient transfer process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up and confirm integrity of instruments and consumables for safe, contaminant-free and efficient transfer process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up and confirm integrity of instruments and consumables for safe, contaminant-free and efficient transfer process.

pcs.text: Load and handle blade safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load and handle blade safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load and handle blade safely.

pcs.text: Check ventilation system is operational and adequate for the task and report any deficiencies in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check ventilation system is operational and adequate for the task and report any deficiencies in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check ventilation system is operational and adequate for the task and report any deficiencies in accordance with workplace procedures.
